description.en: The golden poison frog is a tiny endemic amphibian of Colombia, containing enough alkaloid toxin to kill multiple adult humans.
description.zh: 黄金箭毒蛙是哥伦比亚特有的一种微小两栖动物，其体内含有的生物碱毒素足以杀死多名成年人。

anatomy.en: Don't let its size fool you! This frog is only about two inches long, fitting perfectly in the palm of your hand, but it is super bright! It can be a dazzling mint green, yellow, or orange. This glowing color is nature's stop sign, warning hungry predators: 'Do not eat me!'
anatomy.zh: 别被它的体型骗了！这只青蛙只有大约两英寸长，完全可以放在你的手掌心里，但它颜色极其鲜艳！它可以是耀眼的薄荷绿、黄色或橙色。这种发光的颜色是大自然的停车标志，警告饥饿的捕食者：「别吃我！」

ecology_and_behavior.en: The golden poison frog is considered the most poisonous animal on Earth. A single tiny frog has enough poison in its skin to take down 10 grown adults! The amazing part is they don't make the poison themselves; they absorb it by eating special toxic ants and beetles in the jungle. They are also caring fathers, giving piggyback rides to their tadpoles.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 黄金箭毒蛙被认为是地球上最毒的动物。一只小小的青蛙皮肤里的毒素就足以放倒10个成年人！神奇的是，它们自己并不制造毒素；它们通过吃丛林里特殊的有毒蚂蚁和甲虫来吸收毒素。它们也是有爱的父亲，会背着它们的蝌蚪到处跑。

habitat_and_distribution.en: These deadly but beautiful frogs live in only one place in the whole world: a tiny patch of incredibly wet, humid rainforest on the Pacific coast of Colombia. Their home is disappearing as trees are cut down for farming.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 这些致命但美丽的青蛙只生活在全世界唯一的一个地方：哥伦比亚太平洋沿岸一小片极其潮湿、多雨的热带雨林中。由于人们为了种地砍伐树木，它们的家园正在消失。

habitat.text_en: Primary humid forests of the Chocó region in Colombia
habitat.text_zh: 哥伦比亚乔科地区的潮湿原始森林
